title: Nested Data Structure Debugger
scenario: Given a complex nested data structure (e.g., JSON object or XML tree) containing multiple levels of nested objects, arrays, and conditional logic, generate a prompt that can successfully debug the structure and identify any errors or inconsistencies. The prompt should be able to handle varying levels of nesting, identify invalid or missing data, and provide clear explanations for each found issue.
constraints: Must use a modular and reusable code structure

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the given constraints?
How efficiently does the generated code identify and report errors in the nested data structure?
How clear and concise is the generated code in explaining each found issue?
How reusable is the generated code in handling different nested data structures?
